verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sarah doubted God, How could she bring forth a son When she look at her state she was barren She thought it could never be done But with God all things are possible I know his promisses he will fulfill And it was after she judge him faithful He proved that his word could never fail

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I believe His promise to me A body change I will receive I'm casting out fear, I'm casting out doubt With God in control There's nothing to worry about I believe, yes I believe His promise to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Satan you're a liar And you can't condemn me, You see I understand is not what I could do But it was Jesus did for me And with my God all things are possible And he cannot tell a lie So I'm casting down my reasoning I'm the sinless, spotless Bride of Christ

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I believe His promise to me A body change I will receive I'm casting out fear, I'm casting out doubt With God in control There's nothing to worry about I believe, yes I believe His promise to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I believe His promise to me A body change I will receive I'm casting out fear, I'm casting out doubt With God in control There's nothing to worry about I believe, yes I believe His promise to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: From faith unto faith I rise each day And very soon I know I'll be raptured away I believe, yes I believe His promise to me
